'''Anguilla''' were [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] indigenous to [[Alluuvia]] in [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]].

==Biology and appearance==
They resembled long, muscular eels with long arms and powerful hands. Primitive, nomadic hunters who followed fish school migrations, they determined leadership in tests of strength known as [[Rites of Conch-tar]].

==History==
They were discovered not long after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. A bigoted [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Private/Legends|Private]] shot the first Anguilla he saw upon arrival on the planet on sight, and his fellow Imperial soldiers followed suit, leading to a massacre. The Anguilla were led by [[Anyar]], in cooperation with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], in destroying the [[Imperial Mining, Ltd.]] base on Alluuvia. Anyar negotiated for [[Radell Mining Corporation]] to mine the minerals that filled Alluuvia's oceans (thus toxic to Humans) on the condition the mining was overseen by [[Iych-thae]], an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]].
